rationale: Review 2 correctly identifies a real and verifiable documentation issue at line 108: the `instFiberContinuousConstSMul` docstring includes proof justification ('since each deck transformation acts by a homeomorphism of the fibre'), which Lean/Mathlib convention reserves for the proof, not the docstring. Review 1 incorrectly asserts no such issues exist, so acting on its guidance leaves this style violation in place.
